steps.title: Read the graphed line
steps.content: The line shown is $y=f(x)-19$. Using points $(0,-2)$ and $(4,-10)$, the slope is $-2$ and the equation is $y=-2x-2$.

steps.title: Match to the form with positive $c,d$
steps.content: Rewrite as $f(x)=17-2x=d-cx$ with $d=17,\ c=2$ (both positive). That matches choice A — A is correct.
